details.test: Task 1: Save highest-paying youth-focused grant open in late 2025
Task 2: Create organization profile with specific program areas
Task 3: Start a neighborhood grant application and save as draft
Task 4: Choose grant with lower match requirement between first two results
Task 5: Save comparison of three mid-sized 2023 health grants
Task 6: Subscribe to monthly email alerts for youth and environment grants only
Task 7: Submit an eligibility question about Community Impact Grant via contact form
Task 8: Set deadline reminder emails 14 days before due dates and disable blog emails
